rationale: A0 confirms PowerShell importing SharpHound.ps1 from C:\Temp\ under corp\Administrator at High integrity, a well-known BloodHound AD reconnaissance loader. EV-001 confirms the standalone SharpHound.exe binary was subsequently executed with '--CollectionMethod all', enumerating the full Active Directory environment. EV-002 through EV-008 confirm SharpHound successfully completed its collection run, producing output files covering groups, GPOs, users, OUs, domains, computers, and a final BloodHound.zip archive — all written to C:\Temp\ — proving the AD enumeration was fully executed and data was staged for exfiltration. The use of a writable staging directory (C:\Temp\), execution via cmd.exe wrappers, and the complete BloodHound dataset output leave no benign explanation; this is confirmed adversarial AD reconnaissance activity.
